title: phoenicaulis menziesii var. lanuginosa
intro: Phoenicaulis menziesii var. lanuginosa, also known as woolly Phoenicaulis, is a plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Phoenicaulis menziesii var. lanuginosa include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and has also been used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive problems and menstrual issues.
